title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Software Engineer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
